data.body:
currently, `show` only shows the number of notes and handoff_capsules, unless you specifiy - json.
`claim` shows all of them.

instead, they should show the latest note and the latest handoff_capsule.  at the end of the output, if notes or handoff_capsules were hidden, the output should say 'n' older notes (and/or) 'o' older handoff_capsules not shown.  Use -v/--verbose to see all.

the --json options should work the same, except the suggestion should be json formatted like:

"other": "'n' older notes...."
data.title: `show`/ claim  should show the latest note and latest handoff-capsule
